## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss project timeline adjustments and team changes due to Taylor's early maternity leave.](https://fathom.video/share/j7EkPZxRA9oJFiHkJgqQ1skdearYkTPB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Taylor's maternity leave starts earlier; new product marketer (Kaylee) joins next week to take over the project](https://fathom.video/share/j7EkPZxRA9oJFiHkJgqQ1skdearYkTPB?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [90-day trial period flexibility agreed upon; long-term partnership desired by both parties](https://fathom.video/share/j7EkPZxRA9oJFiHkJgqQ1skdearYkTPB?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Project to resume week of April 14th; interim focus on Terra research incorporation and T're offshoot articles](https://fathom.video/share/j7EkPZxRA9oJFiHkJgqQ1skdearYkTPB?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Intro call with Kaylee scheduled for next Tuesday at 2 PM ET](https://fathom.video/share/j7EkPZxRA9oJFiHkJgqQ1skdearYkTPB?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

## Topics

### Timeline Adjustments
